pgollucci    2010-05-24 21:54:05 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/rubygem-nice-ffi Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Nice-FFI is a layer on top of Ruby-FFI  (and compatible FFI systems) to augment
  it with features to aid development of FFI-based libraries.
  
  WWW: http://jacius.github.com/nice-ffi/
  
  PR:             ports/146729
  Submitted by:   ws      Christoph Kick
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3940    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile

  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/rubygem-nice-ffi/distinfo (new)
